architecture_summary: Bind Personal Assistant approval queue records to the no-effect approval review packet using a digest-only review_packet_ref, while keeping queue projection non-authoritative.
data_model_changes: Add review_packet_ref to approval queue records.
Add review_packet_ref to workflow_v0 items so workflow and record projections bind to the same review evidence.
Represent review_packet_ref as source path, schema path, review packet identity, request identity, plan identity, review state, solver outcome, newline-stable SHA-256 digest, and no-effect flags.
Keep payload_digest_only true so the queue never embeds the approval review packet payload.
migration_plan: No persisted migration is required; this changes a checked-in preview schema, fixture, validator, runtime projection, and tests only.
rollback_plan: Revert the review_packet_ref schema requirement, fixture fields, validator checks, runtime projection additions, and tests; approval queue records return to approval-packet and receipt-only provenance.
validator_changes: Validate review_packet_ref path and schema path stay under the repository root.
Validate review_packet_ref source_sha256 matches the checked-in approval review packet.
Validate review_packet_ref identity and review state match the source packet.
Reject payload_digest_only drift and execution or approval enqueue drift.
Reject workflow item review_packet_ref drift from the owning queue record.
